ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the study started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the study ended */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, suspended) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was approved by the ethics committee */,
  "ethics_committee" TEXT /* Name of the ethics committee that approved the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the comparison belongs to */,
  "comparison_name" TEXT /* Name of the comparison */,
  "baseline_group" TEXT /* Baseline racial or ethnic group */,
  "comparison_group" TEXT /* Comparison racial or ethnic group */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the comparison */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data (e.g., survey, clinical trial) */,
  "data_collection_period" TEXT /* Period during which data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical measure */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison the measure belongs to */,
  "coef" REAL /* Coefficient of the comparison */,
  "std_err" REAL /* Standard error of the coefficient */,
  "t_value" REAL /* t-value of the comparison */,
  "p_value_t" REAL /* p-value of the t-test */,
  "conf_int_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "conf_int_upp" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "pvalue_hs" REAL /* p-value of the hypothesis test */,
  "reject_hs" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the hypothesis is rejected */,
  "method" TEXT /* Statistical method used to calculate the measures */,
  "model_assumptions" TEXT /* Assumptions made in the statistical model */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Level of confidence for the confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistical_measures_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ethnic group */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated population size of the ethnic group */,
  "geographic_distribution" TEXT /* Geographic distribution of the ethnic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "data_collection_start" TEXT /* Date when data collection started */,
  "data_collection_end" TEXT /* Date when data collection ended */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_sources" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., clinical, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_sources_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the visualization belongs to */,
  "viz_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "viz_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  "viz_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "viz_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Table affected by the action */,
  "affected_columns" TEXT /* Columns affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
